children.name: p
children.textContent: Rows of vinyl stools, a lone customer, coffee steam curling under pink neon. The clock says 2:07.

children.name: p
children.textContent: "There's a man on the train who's been looking at the same page for twenty minutes..."

children.name: p
children.textContent: "These aren't for anyone — they're just to have something alive in the apartment."

children.name: p
children.textContent: Brutalist spiral — shadows make it look infinite. Found in a 1970s municipal building.

children.name: p
children.textContent: "Like damp soil after rain. Rough hands, clean product. The kind of brand that doesn't need to shout."

children.name: p
children.textContent: Emotional themes extracted from your moments

children.name: p
children.textContent: "High contrast. Neon against dark. Cinematic still-life energy."

children.name: p
children.textContent: "Neon bleeds. Coffee cools. The booth holds the shape of everyone who's ever sat in it."
